title: humboltia clandestina
side_effects: Humboltia clandestina can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing vomiting, diarrhea, and stomach cramps due to its toxic compounds like bufotoxins. Ingestion of this plant can also lead to cardiac problems, including arrhythmias and cardiac arrest, which can be life-threatening. Additionally, improper use of Humboltia clandestina can cause neurological symptoms, such as seizures, tremors, and muscle weakness. If ingested, it's essential to seek immediate medical attention to minimize the severity of these side effects.
